relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains trade execution records from the investments system, while the outbound file is an account freeze/block action message to the accounts system. These represent fundamentally different domains: trade data vs. account restrictions. No meaningful field overlap exists—trade records lack account identifiers, IBAN formats, or freeze/restriction concepts. The outbound message appears to be triggered by compliance decisions on trades, but the schemas share no common fields or structures that would indicate direct data lineage.
